title: Splash-Remover
description: Removes the Splashes from the Minecraft Title Screen perfect for ModPacks
body:
# **Splash-Remover**
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3322c9c89c4b80a98a2b595b9d9fa5f39ed08cb7.png)


---

## Description

**Splash-Remover** is a simple Minecraft mod that removes the iconic yellow splash text from the title screen. Whether you're looking for a cleaner interface or just want to tweak the appearance of the game, this mod will give you a minimalistic title screen without the distracting splash text.

![Image with removed Splashes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/851c38c4c853524a2e414c4bca81fd6d01e83660_0.webp)
## Features

- Removes the yellow splash text from the Minecraft title screen.
- Fully compatible with all Minecraft versions supported by your modloader (Fabric).
- Does not affect any other game functionalities or visuals, ensuring a smooth, vanilla experience just without the splash text!


## Compatibility

- Works with any modpack and does not interfere with other mods.
- If you're using a custom title screen mod, this will still remove splash texts unless another mod overrides it.

## Credits

Developed by **BlackDev**.

### Contributions and Issues

If you find any bugs or issues, feel free to open an issue on the [GitHub Mod Page](https://github.com/BlackDevLabs/SplashRemover/issues). Contributions to improve the mod or expand its functionality are always welcome!

---
